overall.description: A static third-person perspective scene from a video game showing students studying in a grand Gothic library hall with vaulted stone ceilings, chandeliers, and long wooden tables. The atmosphere is quiet and scholarly with dim artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic library study hall with vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: sitting at a wooden desk reading a book, occasionally turning pages

notable_agents.action: student in blue robes standing in the aisle between tables

entered.detail: ornate stone ribbed vaulting with pointed arches spanning the hall
medieval-style hanging chandelier with multiple candle fixtures
long dark wooden study table with books and papers
large Gothic stone arch framing the left side of the hall
large Gothic stone arch framing the right side of the hall
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books against the left wall
long patterned rug running down the central aisle

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady third-person view over the shoulder of a student reading at a desk in a grand Gothic library. The hall features soaring stone vaulted ceilings, hanging iron chandeliers, and long wooden tables where other students sit studying. A figure in blue robes stands in the central aisle, and the atmosphere is quiet and contemplative.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, contemplative perspective within a grand Gothic library hall. It begins with an over-the-shoulder view of a student reading at a desk, establishing a sense of quiet scholarly focus. As the camera holds its position, the view expands to reveal the scale of the environment, highlighting the soaring stone vaulted ceilings and hanging iron chandeliers. The scene then opens up to show other students studying at long wooden tables, before settling on a figure in blue robes standing in the central aisle.
